package.name: Chembl
package.description: ChEMBL integration, commonly used queries and browser

features.name: Substructure Search
features.description: Lets users draw or paste a query molecule and search the ChEMBL database for all compounds containing that substructure, optionally combined with drug-mechanism and company filters.

members.name: patternSubstructureSearch
members.description: Search for a given substructure in the ChEMBL database.

members.name: QueryBySubstructure
members.description: Complex search combining molecular similarity, drug mechanism action type, and company research location.

features.name: Similarity Search
features.description: Searches ChEMBL for compounds with molecular fingerprint similarity to a given structure, with optional Tanimoto threshold control.

members.name: patternSimilaritySearch
members.description: Searches ChEMBL compounds by molecular fingerprint similarity to a given pattern using Tanimoto coefficient.

members.name: patternSimilaritySearchWithThreshold
members.description: Search for a given pattern in the ChEMBL database with a specified threshold of similarity.

features.name: ID and Structure Conversion
features.description: Converts between ChEMBL identifiers, molregno numbers, compound names, InChI Keys, InChI strings, and SMILES — supporting both single-value and batch dataframe inputs.

members.name: chemblIdToSmiles
members.description: Converts a ChEMBL ID to SMILES. CHEMBL IDs are unique identifiers for compounds in the ChEMBL database, for example CHEMBL1234. Not to be confused with…

members.name: molregnoToSmiles
members.description: Converts a CHEMBL molregno to SMILES. Molregno is a unique registration number for compounds in the ChEMBL database, for example 1234. Not to be confused with…

members.name: nameToSmiles
members.description: Converts a compound name in chembl database to SMILES. For example aspirin or ibuprofen.

members.name: namesToSmiles
members.description: Converts a list of compound names in chembl database to SMILES.

members.name: inchiKeyToChembl
members.description: Converts InChI Keys to ChEMBL identifiers using a dataframe input.

members.name: inchiKeyToSmiles
members.description: Converts InChI Keys to canonical SMILES using a dataframe input.

members.name: inchiKeyToInchi
members.description: Converts InChI Keys to standard InChI strings using a dataframe input.

members.name: chemblToSmiles
members.description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to SMILES.

members.name: chemblToInchi
members.description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to Inchi.

members.name: chemblToInchiKey
members.description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to Inchi Keys.

members.name: ChemblMolregNoBySmiles
members.description: Retrieves the molregno identifier for a compound by its canonical SMILES structure.

features.name: Compound Bioactivity
features.description: Retrieves bioactivity measurements (IC50, Ki, etc.) for compounds against specific ChEMBL targets or proteins, and identifies selectively active compounds across target pairs.

members.name: compound activity details for @target
members.description: Retrieves compound activity details including assay descriptions, standard measurements, and publication references for a specified ChEMBL target.

members.id: query:Chembl:_bioactivity data for bacterial targets for @organism
members.name: _bioactivity data for bacterial targets for @organism
members.description: Retrieves bioactivity data for compounds tested against bacterial targets of a specified organism.

members.name: StructuresByOrganism
members.description: Retrieves compound structures and bioactivity data for bacterial targets of a specified organism.

members.id: query:Chembl:compound activity details for all targets containing @protein
members.name: compound activity details for all targets containing @protein
members.description: Retrieves compound bioactivity data for all targets containing a specified protein accession identifier.

members.id: query:Chembl:_compounds which are selective to one target over a second target
members.name: _compounds which are selective to one target over a second target
members.description: Identifies compounds with selective activity, showing high potency for one target and low potency for another target.

features.name: Compound Info Panels
features.description: Context panels and widgets displaying detailed compound data — SMILES, names, properties, synonyms — when a ChEMBL ID or molregno is selected in a data grid.

members.name: MolregnoInfo
members.description: Retrieves compound SMILES and research company country information for a given molregno identifier.

members.name: ChemblInfo
members.description: Retrieves compound SMILES and research company country information for a given ChEMBL identifier.

members.name: _cbFindByMolregno
members.description: Retrieves detailed compound information by molregno including structure, names, properties, and synonyms.

members.name: ByChemblIds
members.description: Retrieves molecule dictionary information for a list of ChEMBL identifiers.

features.name: ChEMBL Browser
features.description: An interactive browser and demo view for exploring ChEMBL compounds with multi-filter search covering substructure, molecule type, name, max phase, and Lipinski violations.

members.name: _cbChemblBrowserQuery
members.description: Searches ChEMBL compounds by multiple filters including substructure, molecule type, name, max phase, and Lipinski violations.

members.name: _cbAllChemblStructures
members.description: Returns a limited set of all ChEMBL compound structures with canonical SMILES and molregno identifiers.

members.name: ChemblNumberOfStructures
members.description: Returns a specified number of ChEMBL compound structures with canonical SMILES and molregno identifiers.

members.name: Database Queries
members.description: Running various queries to chemical databases using convenient input forms

features.name: Hit Triage Integration
features.description: Provides ChEMBL compound sets and target lists as data sources and enrichment functions for the Datagrok Hit Triage workflow.

features.name: FRAC Classification Search
features.description: Searches ChEMBL compounds by FRAC (Fungicide Resistance Action Committee) classification hierarchy levels, optionally combined with molecular substructure matching.

members.name: FracClassification
members.description: Searches compound structures by FRAC (Fungicide Resistance Action Committee) classification hierarchy levels.

members.name: FracClassificationWithSubstructure
members.description: Combines FRAC classification hierarchy search with molecular substructure matching.

features.name: Pharmacokinetic Data
features.description: Retrieves curated pharmacokinetic parameters — dosage, route, regimen, and measured values — for a specified drug from ChEMBL's curated PK dataset.

members.id: query:Chembl:_PK data from 'Curated Drug Pharmacokinetic Data' source for @drug
members.name: _PK data from 'Curated Drug Pharmacokinetic Data' source for @drug
members.description: Retrieves pharmacokinetic data including dosage, route, regimen, and measured parameters for a specified drug from curated sources.

features.name: Target and Protein Classification
features.description: Exposes the ChEMBL protein classification hierarchy (preferred names, definitions) for browsing and filtering compound targets by protein family.

members.name: _protein classification
members.description: Returns the complete protein classification hierarchy with preferred names and definitions.

features.name: DB Explorer Integration
features.description: Registers ChEMBL as a lazily-loaded DB Explorer data source with semantic type detection for ChEMBL ID columns, enabling chemically-aware browsing of any table containing ChEMBL identifiers.

features.name: Autocomplete Lookup Helpers
features.description: A set of internal autocomplete queries that populate dropdown inputs throughout the ChEMBL UI — compound names, organisms, protein types, target types, assay types, and relationship types.

members.name: _compoundNames
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for compound names matching a substring pattern.

members.name: _organisms
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for organism names matching a substring pattern.

members.name: _proteinTypes
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for protein classification short names matching a substring pattern.

members.name: _targetTypes
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for target types matching a substring pattern.

members.name: _assayTypes
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for assay types matching a substring pattern.

members.name: _relationshipTypes
members.description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for relationship types matching a substring pattern.
